name: pawflow-relay-desktop
description: Desktop manager for standalone PawFlow client relays

scripts.dist: npm run prepare-runtime && npm run build-relay-bin && electron-builder
scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare-runtime && npm run build-relay-bin && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run prepare-runtime && npm run build-relay-bin && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:mac: npm run prepare-runtime && npm run build-relay-bin && electron-builder --mac
scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check scripts/prepare-runtime.js && node --check scripts/build-relay-bin.js && node --check scripts/package-portable.js
